name: diepcustom
description: An open source diep.io custom private-server template

scripts.server: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.dev: tsup --watch --onSuccess "npm run check && npm run start"
scripts.docker:start: docker run --pull never --rm --publish ${PORT:-8080}:8080 --env PORT=8080 --env DEV_PASSWORD_HASH --env SERVER_INFO --env NODE_ENV --init --interactive --tty diepcustom
scripts.docker: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:start
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:conformance && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.test:cpp: cmake -S . -B build/cpp && cmake --build build/cpp && ctest --test-dir build/cpp --output-on-failure
scripts.test:parity: npm run test:cpp && node conformance/protocol/compare-parity.js && node conformance/physics/compare-parity.js && node conformance/entity-core/compare-parity.js && node conformance/gameplay/compare-parity.js && node conformance/headless-parity/compare-constructor-parity.js
